Expertise & Specialization
Core Consulting Capabilities

Technology Transformation

Driving enterprise-wide modernization through strategic technology adoption and legacy system evolution tailored for mission-critical objectives.

Program & Portfolio Management

Ensuring delivery success through rigorous governance architectures, financial oversight, and performance-driven execution models.

Cloud & Infrastructure

Architecting resilient, secure, and scalable multi-cloud environments tailored for highly regulated federal and enterprise ecosystems.

Cybersecurity & Compliance

Strengthening security posture through risk management, regulatory alignment, zero-trust architecture, and proactive cybersecurity governance.

Agile Transformation

Scaling agile frameworks and optimizing organizational performance to accelerate value delivery and workforce adoption across the enterprise.

Strategic Advisory

Strategic consultive services focused on modernizing legacy environments and ensuring resilience in mission-critical program execution.

Methodology
Our Delivery Framework

Our execution model is designed to navigate the complexities of federal missions and enterprise modernization, delivering resilient, strategic outcomes through four disciplined stages.

CONSULT OUR TEAM
01
Advisory & Strategy
Assess current state and define a transformation roadmap aligned with mission and business priorities.
02
Program Governance
Establish governance structures, delivery oversight, and performance metrics for complex initiatives.
03
Modernization Execution
Deliver cloud, platform, and enterprise technology modernization.
04
Adoption & Sustainment
Enable workforce adoption, change management, and long-term operational success.

About neTransform
Built on Experience. Driven by Mission.

neTransform is a certified Woman-Owned Small Business (WOSB) founded by senior technology and management consulting leaders with deep federal and enterprise experience. Our leadership team brings decades of experience from leading global consulting organizations delivering transformation for complex and highly regulated environments.

We combine the strategic rigor of leading consulting organizations with the agility and accountability of a mission-focused partner. Our engagements are led by senior practitioners who understand the operational realities of federal agencies and large enterprises.

neTransform helps organizations modernize technology environments, strengthen governance, and deliver mission-critical initiatives with confidence. Our consulting services combine strategic advisory with hands-on execution to drive measurable outcomes in highly regulated environments.

Core Capabilities
Strategic Consulting Pillars

Technology Transformation

We help organizations modernize legacy technology environments and implement scalable digital architectures aligned with long-term strategic objectives.

Capabilities:
  • Technology strategy and roadmaps
  • Application modernization
  • Enterprise architecture advisory
  • Digital platform transformation

Program & Portfolio Management

Our consultants support the governance and delivery of complex programs through structured portfolio oversight and disciplined execution frameworks.

Capabilities:
  • Program governance frameworks
  • Portfolio investment planning
  • PMO design and implementation
  • Program performance monitoring

Cloud & Infrastructure

We design secure, scalable infrastructure environments that enable organizations to modernize legacy systems and improve operational resilience.

Capabilities:
  • Cloud Migration Strategy
  • Infrastructure modernization
  • Hybrid infrastructure architecture
  • DevSecOps enablement

Cybersecurity & Compliance

We help organizations strengthen their security posture and align with modern cybersecurity standards and regulatory frameworks.

Capabilities:
  • Risk and security assessments
  • Zero-trust architecture design
  • Compliance alignment (NIST, FedRAMP, etc.)
  • Security governance frameworks

Agile Transformation

We help organizations modernize delivery practices through agile frameworks, DevOps adoption, and improved operational collaboration.

Capabilities:
  • Agile operating model design
  • DevSecOps Alignment
  • Value Stream Mapping
  • Agile coaching and enablement

Strategic Advisory

Our senior consultants provide leadership guidance to align technology initiatives with mission priorities and organizational strategy.

Capabilities:
  • Technology investment strategy
  • Transformation planning
  • Executive advisory
  • Governance and risk alignment
Strategic Enablement
Professional Development & Knowledge Transfer

We don't just deliver solutions; we ensure your team has the expertise to sustain them. Our training and enablement services bridge the technical and operational skills gap, ensuring your staff is equipped to own the transformation long after our engagement concludes.

Cloud Enablement

Comprehensive training and certification coaching for AWS cloud architectures, security, and data analytics.

IT Service Management (ITSM)

Expert-led training in ITILv4 frameworks, helping teams streamline service delivery and value streams.

Governance & Frameworks

Practical guidance on leveraging COBIT and IT governance frameworks to align technology investments with business goals.

A Consulting Firm Built for the Complex Technology Transformation

neTransform is a certified Woman-Owned Small Business (WOSB) delivering technology transformation and management consulting to federal agencies and enterprise organizations. We help organizations modernize legacy environments, strengthen operational resilience, and successfully execute complex technology initiatives.

About neTransform
Our Firm

Our Story

neTransform was founded by senior technology and management consulting leaders who spent their careers delivering large-scale technology transformation at some of the world's most recognized advisory firms.

They saw an opportunity to build a firm that combines the strategic depth of large consulting organizations with the agility and accountability of a specialized advisory partner.

Today, neTransform helps federal agencies and enterprise organizations modernize legacy environments, strengthen operational resilience, and successfully execute complex technology initiatives.

Mission

To provide federal agencies and enterprise organizations with the strategic advisory and technical expertise required to navigate complex technology transformations and deliver mission-critical outcomes.

Vision

To be the most trusted advisory partner for organizations modernizing the systems and infrastructure that support critical services, national priorities, and enterprise innovation.

Our Values
Our Guiding Principles

Client's Success

We measure our success by the outcomes we enable for our clients and their missions.

People

We invest in our people and create an environment where they can grow, contribute, and lead.

Teamwork

We collaborate across teams, partners, and clients to solve complex challenges together.

Integrity

We do what we say we will do and operate with transparency, ethics, and accountability.

Change

We embrace change as a constant and help organizations navigate it with structure and confidence.

Our Leadership
Leadership Team
Aprajita Srivastava
Founder & President

Aprajita Srivastava is the President of neTransform and a senior technology and management consulting leader with more than two decades of experience delivering transformation initiatives across federal and commercial organizations. Her work spans program management, strategic planning, analytics, and operational improvement.

Prior to founding neTransform, she held leadership roles across engineering, financial, and consulting organizations, guiding large-scale modernization efforts and cross-functional initiatives. Aprajita holds a BS in Chemical Engineering from the University of Maryland and an MBA from George Washington University.

Vikas Kumar
Managing Partner

Vikas Kumar is Managing Partner at neTransform, responsible for client delivery and expanding the firm's consulting capabilities across federal and commercial markets. He brings more than 20 years of consulting experience advising organizations on program and portfolio management, cloud modernization, and large-scale business transformation initiatives.

Throughout his career, Vikas has supported more than 40 organizations including federal agencies such as the Army, NAVSEA, IRS, TSA, and CBP, as well as leading commercial enterprises across multiple industries. He holds a BS from the University of Georgia, an MBA from George Washington University, and certifications including PMP, ITIL, COBIT, and Certified Auditor.
